title: Wohohoho 11 Sheets Christmas Decorations Window Clings. 140Pcs Xmas Window Decals for Glass with Windows Christmas Elf Faces, Tree, Snowman, Snowflake, Santa Claus, Reindeer for Winter Holiday Party
features: Great Value Christmas Window Clings: The Package include 10 sheet Window Clings Stickers, 12pcs Large Elf Faces stickers in total. They're extremely festive and add the holiday spirit to the rooms in which they were applied. Christmas theme design, adding joy to the holiday season.

Classic Element & Double-Sided Design: Our christmas window decorations allowing you to enjoy Interesting patterns from both the inside and outside, includes 11 sheets different patterns, featuring elements like elf Faces, snowflake, candy, reindeer, Christmas Tree, Santa Claus, more charm to your window decorations

Easy to Use: These christmas window stickers are adorable. Easy to apply and remove. No need for glue, Just clean windows surface and spray a little water on the Clings before stick it on. They are a snap to add to your windows and come off with ease afterward without leaving a trace on the glass.

Enhanced Kid-Friendly Home Decor: Engage children in the holiday spirit with these kid-friendly window decals. The playful designs featuring beloved Christmas characters and elements make decorating an interactive and joyful experience for the little ones.

Versatile Application: These winter window clings are perfect for Christmas parties and make it memorable. You can use these Christmas wall decals on glass windows to decorate any room in your home, refrigerator, school, church, glass doors, store windows, tiles, offices, retail stores, cafes, restaurants, supermarkets, and more.

Long-Lasting Festive Charm: These holiday window clings are vibrant and eye-catching. Their high-quality materials ensure they retain their allure, making them a perfect addition to your Christmas decor, brightening up your home year after year.if you encounter any quality problem, we will solve it for you immediately.
description: Product Description Excellent Christmas Decoration Christmas window clings for glass windows are very suitable for Christmas and winter season occasions. Christmas window stickers can be used in windows and glass. Create a Warm Christmas Atmosphere Double Sided Exquisite Appearance Double sided Xmas window clings, beautify your holiday home décor, create a happy Xmas atmosphere, enjoy your walking into a white wonderland! 12Pcs Christmas Elf Faces Stickers In addition to the Christmas elements and elf window stickers, we also include an extra Christmas elf face sticker. You can stick it anywhere to enhance the Christmas atmosphere. 11 Sheets Christmas Window Clings Stickers Each window decorations stickers size is 29 x 20 cm/ 11.4 x 7.9 inch, featuring elements like elf Faces, snowflake, candy, reindeer, Christmas Tree, Santa Claus, and more. Easy to use Multiple Application Easy to decorate: Used for windows, glass storm doors, mirrors. As it's static Halloween window clings, no adhesive, stick all by themselves. It wouldn't stick to walls, cars, wood door and so on. It can be clung on clean smooth surface like mirrors, windows, and bathtubs.
